title: Visionary Business Plan
scenario: Develop a one-page business plan for a startup that specializes in virtual reality experiences. The target artifact is a 200-word text that outlines the company's mission, target market, and revenue streams.
constraints: Must use bullet points for key points

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the business plan is under 200 words and uses bullet points for key points.
Evaluate the tone of the business plan, ensuring it's professional and visionary.
Verify that the business plan accurately outlines the company's mission, target market, and revenue streams.
